title: Welcome to new lab members!
---

We are thrilled to welcome Yonina Loskove — a PhD student in the Genetics and Molecular Biology (GMB) Graduate Program — who will be joining us to perform her PhD thesis research. We are also thrilled to welcome several excellent undergraduate students who will be joining us for research this semester: Sona Davis, Jordyn Kirksey, Sylvie Call, and others.
